decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 97/3229 lines reworked (3.0%, 20/50). 0/34 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 4.9% (5/20).

Session 10: 45 (process:20 efficiency:17 ttfw:8). Session 11: 26 (process:20 efficiency:5 ttfw:1). Session 12: 29 (process:20 efficiency:8 ttfw:1).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 227/227 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
